channel.title: Posts on Rui Peixoto
channel.description: Recent content in Posts on Rui Peixoto

item.title: On the hunt
item.description: I have recently completed my Master of Science Degree in Mathematics at Instituto Superior Técnico, University of Lisbon. I am happy to report that my thesis Vertex Superalgebras from Prefactorization Algebras earned the maximum possible grade of 20/20. I am now applying to PhD positions! You can read more about my interests here. Feel free to reach out regarding possible PhD projects.

item.title: Welcome!
item.description: Welcome to my personal website! My name is Rui Peixoto. I am interested in mathematics and its applications to physics and computer science. You can read more about me or contact me at rmp at ruimp.com. I am always happy to discuss anything math and science.
